title: Groups
subtitle: Create and manage volunteer groups
description: Groups are used to categorize volunteers. Volunteers reference a group via the groupAffiliation field (foreign key).
searchPlaceholder: Search by group name or ID…

dialogs.createDescription: Add a new group that volunteers can be assigned to.
dialogs.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Volunteers assigned to it will be moved to the Default group.

toasts.reassignError: Failed to move volunteers to Default group
